creator: rumpelsepp@sevenbyte.org
text:
Comment on attachment 165750
Update syncthing-inotify to 0.6.8

diff --git a/net/syncthing-inotify/Makefile b/net/syncthing-inotify/Makefile
index 86468b5..eede7ff 100644
--- a/net/syncthing-inotify/Makefile
+++ b/net/syncthing-inotify/Makefile
@@ -1,7 +1,7 @@
 # $FreeBSD$

 PORTNAME=      syncthing-inotify
-PORTVERSION=   0.6.7
+PORTVERSION=   0.6.8
 DISTVERSIONPREFIX=     v
 CATEGORIES=    net

diff --git a/net/syncthing-inotify/distinfo b/net/syncthing-inotify/distinfo
index 420f295..8dcd815 100644
--- a/net/syncthing-inotify/distinfo
+++ b/net/syncthing-inotify/distinfo
@@ -1,5 +1,5 @@
